LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR ORDER ENTERING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS GRANTED; THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY TO THE PLAINTIFF THE SUM OF $528.00 FOR RENT OWING NO LATER THAN 03/01/04 AND SHALL VACATE THE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 03/01/04. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

Off Calendar Feb-10-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John P. Zanghi, Esq. (415) 241-1166 for Plaintiff and Moving Party Caritas Management Corporation
John Kelly, Defendant Propria Persona
RULING:
A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION'S Motion For Order Entering Judgment Pursuant To Settlement Agreement is GRANTED; the Defendant shall pay to the Plaintiff the sum of $528.00 for rent owing no later than 03/01/04 and shall vacate the premises on or before 03/01/04. Prevailing party to submit form of order.(301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-29-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John P. Zanghi, Esq. for plaintiff
Fred Doughty, Manager for plaintiff, Caritas Management
John Kelly, Defendant in pro per

Unlawful detainer settlement conference held. Parties entered into signed agreement. Settlemrnt terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 3048 16th street, #318, SF, CA. See scanned document.
JPT: Anne Hipshman Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge. (218)
